<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mime\HtmlToTextConverter; use League\HTMLToMarkdown\HtmlConverter; use League\HTMLToMarkdown\HtmlConverterInterface; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class LeagueHtmlToMarkdownConverter implements HtmlToTextConverterInterface { public function __construct( private HtmlConverterInterface $converter = new HtmlConverter([ 'hard_break' => true, 'strip_tags' => true, 'remove_nodes' => 'head style', ]), ) { } public function convert(string $html, string $charset): string { return $this->converter->convert($html); } }
